records.question: Which colleges are located in Ottawa and have Ousame Tounkara as their leader?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.college_id FROM college
WHERE college.college_location = 'Ottawa' AND college.leader_name = 'Ousame Tounkara'
records.pred_sql: select college.college_id from college where lower(college.college_location) like '%ottawa%' and lower(college.leader_name) like '%ousame tounkara%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter colleges by location containing 'ottawa' and leader name containing 'ousame tounkara', then select their college_id with a limit of 5.

records.question: Which colleges located in McGill have a member named J. C. Snead?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.college_id FROM college
JOIN member ON college.college_id = member.college_id
WHERE member.name = 'J. C. Snead' AND college.college_location = 'McGill'
records.pred_sql: select college.college_id from college join member on college.college_id = member.college_id where lower(college.college_location) like '%mcgill%' and lower(member.name) like '%j. c. snead%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter colleges located in McGill and join with members having a name like 'j. c. snead' to find matching colleges.

SELECT college.college_id FROM college

records.thought: Filter colleges by name containing 'edmonton school', location containing 'mcgill', and leader name containing 'samir chahine'.

records.question: Which colleges named B.C. School are located in Minnesota and have members from the United States?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.college_id FROM college
JOIN member ON college.college_id = member.college_id
WHERE member.country = 'United States' AND college.college_location = 'Minnesota' AND college.name = 'B.C. School'
records.pred_sql: select distinct college.college_id from college join member on college.college_id = member.college_id where lower(college.name) like '%b.c. school%' and lower(college.college_location) like '%minnesota%' and lower(member.country) like '%united states%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter colleges with name like 'b.c. school' and location like 'minnesota', then join members from the United States to ensure the college has such members.
